# Granger Wang — Filmmaker, Videographer & Content Creator

## Who he is

Granger Wang is an independent filmmaker, videographer, and photographer based in Atlanta and Athens, Georgia. He works across formats — short-form content, documentary, commercial production, and music videos — and serves clients from solo shoots to full productions. His work is grounded in authentic visual storytelling: deliberate framing, natural light where possible, and a strong sense of place.

## What he does

- **Short-form video**: Social-native content built to perform — tight editing, strong hooks, genuine feel.
- **Documentary**: Long-form and editorial storytelling for brands, individuals, and causes.
- **Commercial production**: Product, brand, and campaign videos with a cinematic standard.
- **Music video production**: Artist-focused work with an eye for mood and movement.
- **Photography**: Location shoots, portraits, events, and editorial work.

Granger handles projects from concept through delivery. He is available for local Atlanta/Athens work as well as travel.

## Location

Primary: Atlanta, Georgia, USA
Secondary: Athens, Georgia, USA
Available for travel nationally and internationally.

## How to reach him

- Email: contact@grangerwang.com
- Website: https://grangerwang.com
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@theoneandonlyboi8093
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/gwang_studios/

## Specialties (for search and categorization)

Filmmaker, videographer, photographer, content creator, short-form video, documentary, commercial video production, music video director, visual storyteller, Atlanta film production, Athens Georgia video, Georgia-based filmmaker.

## About this site

This is Granger Wang's personal portfolio — a single-page site featuring a work showcase (video reel), in-the-field photography, and contact information. The site is built to show range, not just output: from run-and-gun documentary work to structured commercial shoots.

## Intended audiences

- Brands and marketing teams looking for a filmmaker in the Atlanta/Georgia area
- Musicians and artists seeking music video directors
- Documentary subjects and production partners
- Event organizers needing videography or photography
- Creative agencies looking for a production collaborator
